---
title: "Hi, I'm Pat"
page-layout: full
anchor-sections: false
---

I'm a data scientist and statistical programmer who builds tools for understanding the world through data. I work in R, write about statistics and simulations, and occasionally build R packages.


:::{.column-screen .brand-banner-color}
:::{.column-page}

::: {.row}
::: {.col-md-6 .d-none .d-sm-block}
::: {.banner-image-container}
![](images/posts/posts-transparent.png){.banner-image}
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6 .d-flex .flex-column}

## [Posts](posts.qmd) 


::: {.row .my-auto}
::: {.col-sm-4}

::: {.icon-block}

<i class="fa-solid fa-chart-column"></i>

###  Analyses
:::

:::
::: {.col-sm-4}

::: {.icon-block}
  <i class="fa-solid fa-code"></i>
  
###  Code

:::

:::
::: {.col-sm-4}

::: {.icon-block}
  <i class="fa-solid fa-mug-saucer"></i>
  
###  Hobbies

:::

:::
:::


:::
:::

:::
:::



<!-- switch to software/projects here -->


:::{.column-screen .brand-banner}
:::{.column-page}

::: {.row}
::: {.col-md-6 .order-2 .order-md-1}

## [Projects and Software](projects.qmd)

Projects built on (or building) Python, FastAPI, SQL, R Packages, Shiny, Docker, and sometimes Go. 

:::


::: {.col-md-6 .d-none .d-sm-block .order-1 .order-md-2}
::: {.banner-image-container}
![](images/projects/projects.png){.banner-image-outline} 
:::
:::
:::

:::
:::



<!-- final banner here with some color -->

:::{.column-screen .brand-banner-color}
:::{.column-page}

::: {.row}
::: {.col-md-6 .d-none .d-sm-block}
::: {.banner-image-container}
![](images/about.png){.banner-image}
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6}

## [About Me](about.qmd)

A bit more about my background, skills, and work of yours I might be able to contribute to!

:::
:::

:::
:::
